pages.text: All The Goodies watches what you find and automatically figures out where you are in the pack. This $(italic)Progression Tier$() (PPT, 0–6) only ever goes up — it latches the moment you hit a milestone, then stays there forever.

pages.title: The Tiers
pages.text: $(li)$(bold)0 — Stranded:$() Brand new. No markers yet.$(br)$(li)$(bold)1 — Established:$() Found iron.$(br)$(li)$(bold)2 — Industrial:$() Touched Mekanism (osmium/steel/enricher).$(br)$(li)$(bold)3 — Allthemodium:$() Found Allthemodium ore or ingot.$(br)$(li)$(bold)4 — Vibranium:$() Found Vibranium.$(br)$(li)$(bold)5 — Unobtainium:$() Found Unobtainium.$(br)$(li)$(bold)6 — Star-chase:$() Touched alloys, Piglich hearts, or an ATM Star.

pages.title: Tier-Up Rewards
pages.text: The first time you hit a new tier, you get a free $(item)ATM Cache$() and a gold message announcing your stage. The cache uses your new tier's loot pool — it's a reward for the climb, not a consolation prize.

pages.title: Check Your Tier
pages.text: Run $(thing)/atg ppt$() to see your current tier and its name.$(br2)Run $(thing)/atg stars$() to see how many ATM Stars you've collected toward the 25 needed to complete the pack.$(br2)These are op-level commands — ask your server admin if you need them.
